title: MagicBricks is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: MagicBricks is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? MagicBricks in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MagicBricks:
MagicBricks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks!
